name: lobster-resume
description: A Codex plugin for collecting candidate background, selecting bundled resume templates, brainstorming JD-fit evidence, and generating tailored resumes from job descriptions.

interface.longDescription: Collects a candidate's education, GPA, internships, projects, awards, skills, and preferences, chooses from bundled Word resume templates and previews, offers JD-driven brainstorming to uncover relevant evidence, then generates a company- and role-matched resume plus interview advice from any job description text, screenshot, PDF, DOCX, or document upload.
defaultPrompt: Use $lobster-resume to brainstorm and tailor my resume to this JD.
Use $lobster-resume to polish my internship bullets.
